name: agent-access
description: Universal access layer for AI agents: route websites, apps, APIs, and workflows to agent-native CLIs, structured retrieval, browser/GUI fallback, or reviewed contribution drafts.

interface.shortDescription: Universal access layer for agent-native CLIs
interface.longDescription: Agent Access is a universal thin access layer for AI agents. This Codex package is one adapter: it helps Codex prefer agent-native CLIs and structured APIs for websites, local apps, and repeat workflows, then use browser/CDP or Computer Use only for gaps. Reusable discoveries become reviewed CLI contracts, registry entries, or focused references.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Access to check whether this website, app, or API already has an agent-native CLI.
Use Agent Access to design a reusable CLI contract for this repeated web/app workflow.
Use Agent Access to inspect the auth, session refresh, and recovery plan for this companion tool.
